title: vicia anguste-pinnata
intro: Vicia anguste-pinnata, also known as the narrow-pinnate vetch or narrow-pinnate vetch pea, is a perennial legume native to China and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Vicia anguste-pinnata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
